creator: jgh@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is more than likely due to a corrupt master.passwd file. Please check
your database with pwd_mkdb utility.

Chances are that this is not due to this port specifically, but any port
that would attempt to install a user.

-jgh
-- 
Jason Helfman
FreeBSD Committer | http://people.freebsd.org/~jgh | The Power To Serve
